description: Focused 70-turn extractor-only expected state overlay. Labels are conversation-text state expectations, not retrieval/GT success labels.

label_policy.gt_policy: Do not infer state from the ground-truth track. If user text asks for an exact song, label exact_track even when GT differs.
label_policy.retrieval_policy: Retrieval is not scored here; profile/mode are operational state fields only.
